final_prompt.prompt:
Create a news/editorial banner image for a Weibo hot-topic post.

Style/medium: needs professional documentary photography aesthetic with news-photo impact — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be wide panoramic banner with horizontal extension, ample negative space for text overlay
Subject: must include city skyline at dusk with neon lights beginning to glow, pedestrians in motion blur, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset glow
Scene/backdrop: must be urban cityscape at dusk with dramatic light and shadow contrast, strong sense of real on-site presence
Lighting/mood: needs dusk/sunset atmosphere with neon lights emerging, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs warm sunset tones mixed with cool neon accents — exact color grading is yours
Materials/textures: needs sharp detail texture with 8K quality feel — exact grain and sharpness level is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, prominent, bold or modern typeface), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (secondary), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (watermark, bottom or bottom-right)
Constraints: must be 16:9 aspect ratio, professional high-end aesthetic suitable for Weibo viral post, sufficient negative space for text overlay
Avoid: must avoid over-processed or artificial-looking effects
